'''Thanu''' were [[Diet/Legends|silicavores]] native to the [[Volcano/Legends|volcanoes]] of [[Kamur]]. They ate rocks, digesting organic materials trapped therein and expelling the crushed leftovers. The ability to eat rocks was only gained at maturity, and young survived by eating [[Plant/Legends|plants]].<ref name="CG" />

{{Species-stub}}
